LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INCORPORATED'S hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment as to MAIN STREET MEAT & FISH CORPORATION dba MAIN STREET MEAT & FISH MARKET is Denied, without prejudice. Plaintiff did not file proof of service that this application was served on defendant. No opposition was filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
